function.name: subtract_hours
function.description: Subtract hours from a given time.
function.long_description: Calculates a new time by subtracting a specified number of hours from a given time.
example_user_queries: Call subtract_hours with time_string 07:10, hours 4, and format %H:%M.
If the time is 10:50, what do I get after subtracting 6 hours?
Take 1 hour away from 00:30 in 24-hour format.
Shift 03:05 PM backward by 9 hours using %I:%M %p.
Calculate the new time after subtracting 7 hours from 21:40.
